componentDescription: Renders an alert with various styles and states to display important messages to users.

icon.description: Custom icon to display in the alert, overriding the default icon for the chosen variant.

title.description: The bold title text for the alert, displayed above the description.

views.description: Custom styling properties for different sub-components of the alert (e.g., container, icon, title, description).

description.description: The main descriptive text content of the alert, rendered if no children are provided.

variant.description: Defines the visual style and semantic meaning of the alert, affecting colors and default icon.

themeMode.description: Overrides the global theme mode for this specific alert component (e.g., 'light' or 'dark').

children.description: Content to display as the main description, used if the 'description' prop is empty.

props.description: Additional properties to pass directly to the root Horizontal container component of the alert.
